# kraftwerk — Full Documentation for LLMs

> An opinionated fullstack monorepo boilerplate.

## Etymology

**kraftwerk** (German: /ˈkʁaftvɛʁk/) — power plant, factory

Like a power plant generates energy, kraftwerk generates the foundation for your fullstack apps.

## Overview

kraftwerk is a production-ready fullstack monorepo boilerplate designed for building scalable applications. It provides a modern, opinionated setup with best-in-class tooling for both frontend and backend development.

## Tech Stack

### Build System
- **Turborepo** — Incremental builds, remote caching, task orchestration
- **pnpm** — Fast, disk-efficient package manager with strict isolation

### Language & Types
- **TypeScript 5.7+** — Strict mode, ESM-only, latest features
- **Biome** — Unified linting and formatting (replaces ESLint + Prettier)

### Frontend
- **React 19** — Latest patterns, no forwardRef needed
- **Tailwind CSS v4** — CSS-first configuration with @theme directive
- **Vite 6** — Next-generation frontend tooling

### Backend
- **Elysia** — Fast, type-safe web framework
- **Bun** — Fast JavaScript runtime
- **Drizzle ORM** — TypeScript-first SQL ORM
- **PostgreSQL 17** — Database (Docker)

### Testing
- **Vitest** — Fast unit testing with native ESM support

### CI/CD
- **GitHub Actions** — Automated workflows for lint, test, build
- **semantic-release** — Automated versioning and changelog
- **Renovate** — Automated dependency updates

## Workspace Structure

```
kraftwerk/
├── packages/
│   ├── frontend/               # Vite + React application
│   │   ├── src/
│   │   │   ├── App.tsx         # Main application component
│   │   │   ├── main.tsx        # Entry point
│   │   │   ├── env.ts          # T3 Env validation
│   │   │   └── index.css       # Global styles
│   │   ├── public/             # Static assets
│   │   └── index.html          # HTML template
│   ├── backend/                # Elysia + Bun API server
│   │   ├── src/
│   │   │   ├── index.ts        # Elysia app entry
│   │   │   ├── env.ts          # T3 Env validation
│   │   │   ├── db/             # Drizzle ORM (schema, client, migrate)
│   │   │   ├── modules/        # API modules (health, etc.)
│   │   │   └── plugins/        # Elysia plugins (CORS, etc.)
│   │   └── drizzle.config.ts   # Drizzle Kit config
│   ├── config/                 # Shared configuration
│   │   ├── biome/              # Biome configs (base, react, node)
│   │   ├── typescript/         # TypeScript configs (base, react, node)
│   │   └── vitest/             # Vitest configs
│   └── ui/                     # Design system
│       ├── src/
│       │   ├── components/     # React components
│       │   ├── styles/         # Theme and CSS
│       │   ├── brand.ts        # Branding config
│       │   └── index.ts        # Barrel exports
│       └── .storybook/         # Storybook configuration
├── docs/                       # Documentation
│   ├── specification.md        # Project specification
│   ├── ai-guidelines.md        # AI development guidelines
│   ├── design-standard.md      # Component design standard
│   ├── getting-started.md      # Quick start guide
│   └── usage.md                # Usage documentation
├── .github/
│   ├── workflows/              # CI/CD workflows
│   └── copilot-instructions.md # GitHub Copilot instructions
├── docker-compose.yaml         # PostgreSQL service
├── .env.example                # Environment variables template
├── AGENTS.md                   # Universal AI agent instructions
├── turbo.json                  # Turborepo configuration
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml         # pnpm workspace definition
└── biome.json                  # Root Biome configuration
```

## Available Scripts

### Monorepo Scripts
| Script | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `pnpm install` | Install dependencies |
| `pnpm dev` | Run frontend + backend concurrently |
| `pnpm dev:frontend` | Run frontend only (Vite, port 5173) |
| `pnpm dev:backend` | Run backend only (Elysia, port 3000) |
| `pnpm build` | Build all packages |
| `pnpm lint` | Lint all workspaces |
| `pnpm format` | Check formatting |
| `pnpm format:write` | Format and write |
| `pnpm test` | Run all tests |

### UI Package Scripts
| Script | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `pnpm ui:dev` | Start Storybook (port 6006) |
| `pnpm ui:build` | Build UI library |
| `pnpm ui:build-storybook` | Build static Storybook |
| `pnpm ui:test` | Run UI tests |
| `pnpm ui:lint` | Lint UI package |

### Database Scripts
| Script | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `pnpm db:up` | Start PostgreSQL (Docker Compose) |
| `pnpm db:down` | Stop PostgreSQL |
| `pnpm db:generate` | Generate Drizzle migrations |
| `pnpm db:migrate` | Run Drizzle migrations |
| `pnpm db:studio` | Open Drizzle Studio |

## Quick Start

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/w-arantes/kraftwerk.git
cd kraftwerk

# Install dependencies
pnpm install

# Setup environment
cp .env.example .env

# Start database
pnpm db:up
pnpm db:migrate

# Start development (frontend + backend)
pnpm dev

# Or start Storybook for UI development
pnpm ui:dev
```

## UI Components

The `@kraftwerk/ui` package includes:

- **Button** — Primary, secondary, ghost, destructive variants with sizes
- **Card** — Container component with header, content, footer slots
- **Input** — Text input with size variants
- **Select** — Native select with ChevronDown icon and sizes
- **Label** — Form label primitive
- **Textarea** — Multi-line text input with sizes
- **Badge** — Status indicators with variant and size options
- **Separator** — Horizontal/vertical divider
- **Switch** — Toggle switch with controlled state
- **Logo** — kraftwerk branding component
- **Terminal** — Code/terminal display component
- **AnimatedTerminal** — Terminal with typing animation
- **FeatureCard** — Feature showcase card
- **ThemeToggle** — Dark/light mode toggle

## Design Tokens

Theme colors are defined via CSS variables in `packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css` and branding in `packages/ui/src/brand.ts`:

```css
/* Dark Theme (Default) */
--color-bg-main: #050505;
--color-bg-surface: #0a1f0a;
--color-text-primary: #39ff14;
--color-text-muted: #228b22;
--color-accent: #00ff41;
--color-border-palette: #003b00;

/* Light Theme */
--color-bg-main: #f0fff0;
--color-bg-surface: #e0f5e0;
--color-text-primary: #0a4f0a;
--color-accent: #00a020;
```

## Backend Architecture

The backend uses a modular Elysia architecture:

- **Modules**: Feature modules under `src/modules/` (e.g., `health/route.ts`)
- **Plugins**: Shared plugins under `src/plugins/` (e.g., CORS)
- **Database**: Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL, schema in `src/db/schema.ts`
- **Env validation**: T3 Env + Zod in `src/env.ts`
- **CORS**: Configured via `@elysiajs/cors`

## AI Development

kraftwerk includes AI development support:

### Documentation Hierarchy
1. **AGENTS.md** — Universal AI agent instructions
2. **docs/ai-guidelines.md** — Detailed AI development guidelines
3. **.github/copilot-instructions.md** — GitHub Copilot instructions

### MCP Tools
- **Figma MCP** — Design-to-code workflows
- **shadcn MCP** — Component generation
- **Context7 MCP** — Documentation enrichment

## Quality Gates

Before committing:
1. `pnpm lint` — Must pass
2. `pnpm format` — Must pass
3. `pnpm test` — Must pass
4. Remove AI slop (unnecessary comments, defensive code, any casts)

2. Create a feature branch
3. Follow the AI guidelines and quality gates
4. Submit a pull request
